Description lacks details about what inputs are expected (content, platforms, scheduling), what is returned (message ID, status), and side effects (notification queuing/scheduling). Enhanced description clarifies these aspects for AI agent decision-making.

data.current_description: Create and send a new push notification to application subscribers.
data.description_suggestion: Creates and sends a new push notification to application subscribers. Accepts notification content, platform-specific parameters, scheduling options, and delivery preferences. Returns a message ID and delivery status. The notification is immediately queued for delivery or scheduled for future delivery based on provided parameters.
data.reasoning: Description lacks details about what inputs are expected (content, platforms, scheduling), what is returned (message ID, status), and side effects (notification queuing/scheduling). Enhanced description clarifies these aspects for AI agent decision-making.

message: Operation 'deleteMessage' has semantic quality issues: missing_input_details, missing_output_details, missing_side_effects. Original description is incomplete. Missing details about required input (message ID), return value (confirmation), and important side effects (behavior differs for scheduled vs. sent messages, delivery finality). Enhanced version clarifies these for AI agents.

data.current_description: Delete a scheduled or sent push notification.
data.description_suggestion: Deletes a scheduled or sent push notification by message ID. Requires the message ID as input. Returns confirmation of deletion. Deleting a sent notification prevents further delivery attempts; deleting a scheduled notification prevents it from being sent. Already-delivered notifications cannot be recalled.
data.reasoning: Original description is incomplete. Missing details about required input (message ID), return value (confirmation), and important side effects (behavior differs for scheduled vs. sent messages, delivery finality). Enhanced version clarifies these for AI agents.

Description lacks specificity about required input (message ID) and what details are returned (status, statistics, parameters). data.current_description: Get details of a specific push notification message.
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves detailed information about a specific push notification message by message ID. Returns message content, delivery status, platform-specific parameters, targeting criteria, scheduling information, and delivery statistics including sent count, open count, and click count.
data.reasoning: Summary is too generic ('Get message details'). Description lacks specificity about required input (message ID) and what details are returned (status, statistics, parameters). Enhanced version clarifies inputs and comprehensive output for AI agent understanding.

message: Operation 'createTargetedMessage' has semantic quality issues: missing_input_details, missing_output_details. Description mentions targeting but lacks specificity about input parameters (tag conditions, filter types, segmentation options) and output details (message ID, status). Enhanced version clarifies the advanced targeting capabilities and expected return values for AI agent clarity.

data.current_description: Create and send a push notification with advanced audience targeting using tag conditions and filters.
data.description_suggestion: Creates and sends a push notification with advanced audience targeting using tag conditions, device filters, and segmentation criteria. Accepts notification content, targeting rules (tag-based conditions, device types, geographic filters), platform-specific parameters, and scheduling options. Returns a message ID and initial delivery status. Notifications are queued for delivery to matching audience segments.
data.reasoning: Description mentions targeting but lacks specificity about input parameters (tag conditions, filter types, segmentation options) and output details (message ID, status). Enhanced version clarifies the advanced targeting capabilities and expected return values for AI agent clarity.

data.current_description: Retrieve push notification history for the application.
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves the push notification history for the application with optional filtering and pagination. Accepts optional parameters for date range, message status, and pagination (limit, offset). Returns a list of push notifications with details including message ID, content, delivery status, send time, recipient count, and engagement metrics (opens, clicks). Results are ordered by send time in descending order.
data.reasoning: Summary is too vague ('Get push history'). Description lacks input details (filtering, pagination options) and output details (what fields are returned, ordering). Enhanced version clarifies filtering capabilities, pagination support, and comprehensive return data for AI agents.

message: Operation 'cancelMessage' has semantic quality issues: missing_input_details, missing_output_details, missing_side_effects. Description lacks critical details about required input (message ID), return value (confirmation), and important side effects (only works for scheduled messages, prevents delivery, removes from queue). Enhanced version clarifies these constraints and effects for AI agent decision-making.

data.current_description: Cancel a previously scheduled push notification.
data.description_suggestion: Cancels a previously scheduled push notification by message ID. Requires the message ID as input. Returns confirmation of cancellation. Only scheduled notifications that have not yet started delivery can be cancelled. Cancelling a message prevents it from being sent to any recipients and removes it from the delivery queue.
data.reasoning: Description lacks critical details about required input (message ID), return value (confirmation), and important side effects (only works for scheduled messages, prevents delivery, removes from queue). Enhanced version clarifies these constraints and effects for AI agent decision-making.
